description: Three regional country boundary files have been prepared in `/home/ga/GIS_Data/regions/`: `europe_countries.geojson`, `africa_countries.geojson`, and `south_america_countries.geojson`. Your task is to merge these three separate datasets into a single unified vector layer using QGIS. Save the merged result as a GeoJSON file to `/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/merged_countries.geojson`. Ensure the output contains all countries from the three input regions, preserves their original attributes (NAME, CONTINENT, etc.), and maintains the Coordinate Reference System (CRS) as WGS 84 (EPSG:4326).
